description: NFL Play-by-Play Passing Stats by Down & Formation
proposed_title: NFL 2023 Pass Completion by Pass Length and Down
encoding_note: Filter rows where pass_attempt=1; binary outcome = complete_pass (1=success); treatment = pass_length (short vs deep, 2 levels); stratum = down (1-4); aggregate Successes=SUM(complete_pass), Cases=COUNT(*) per (pass_length x down) cell.
